right_offer.title: SRAM XG-1090 PowerDome-X 10sp Cassette
right_offer.description: Superlight PowerDome-X construction: middle 8 cogs are heat treated and CNC-machined from a single piece of 4130 CrMo steel, providing a harder and ultimately lighter product than titaniumLightening ports in larger cog shelves mated with a spider-ported aluminum big cog and steel 11t 1st-position cog mirror the strength and weight savings borrowed from XX technology (CX: 12-27 range specifically designed or Cyclocross gearing)X-Glide tooth profiling coupled with elastomer StealthRing spacers reduce vibration and drivetrain noise while providing super-fast shifts and loss-less power transferFits 8-10sp SRAM/Shimano-spline freehub bodies for 10sp shifting/spacingIncludes anodized 7000-series aluminum lockring

task.policy_text: Return a normalized match report that is internally consistent. A match requires the same core product, not only a nearby accessory or variant.

confuser_offers.title: RAM Double Socket Arm MC201C LONG
confuser_offers.description: The RAM-MC-201-C, Long double socket arm, has a socket at both ends that accommodates 1\" ball bases. A single spring inside the arm opens the end sockets, allowing you to pivot the ball and socket connection. This socket technology allows for almost infinite adjustment and perfect viewing angles.
